name: com.sungeargames.perfmeter
description: Runtime performance diagnostics layer and agent-readable profiling API for Unity 6000.4+ URP 17.4 Render Graph projects. Older Unity versions are import-safe only and are not officially supported.

samples.description: Minimal runtime bootstrap component plus a Resources JSON settings example.
Overlay presets, session export, alert callbacks, overdraw controls, and camera snapshot replay examples.
Editor setup menu actions and MCP command examples for agent-driven workflows.
